content.text:
Based on the glob search results, I found **95 Go files** in the core/ directory and its subdirectories.

These files are distributed across multiple subdirectories including:
- core/adapters/ (inbound and outbound adapters)
- core/application/services/
- core/cmd/ (command-line tools)
- core/domain/ (domain models)
- core/e2e/ (end-to-end tests)
- core/pkg/ (packages)
- core/ports/
